exploration_notes: Comprehensive RBAC authorization flow traced from HTTP handler chain through authentication, impersonation, and authorization filters to the union authorizer chain (system:masters bypass → Node → RBAC → Webhook). The RBAC evaluator resolves ClusterRoleBindings and RoleBindings, matches subjects to the authenticated user, fetches role rules, and checks each PolicyRule against request attributes using exact/wildcard matching. Key security controls include default-deny (NoOpinion treated as deny),
